title: Extrabotany
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84933cc3f87ba24224ba0a90b14e00d63103a325.png)

Popolar botania addition comes back!

For higher minecraft version.

### What's New?

**Texures**

Almost all textures has been rewrited!

- Better Looking: Sharper, cleaner, and more detailed visuals.
- Style-Aligned: Carefully redesigned to better match the vanilla Minecraft aesthetic.

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9778980ef1f9896f362ac980df2569ea2eb5cd8.png)
![overview2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01976d89790c22a1756738b9eee36ad013ce64b1.png)

**Flowers**

- Tradeorchid: Use mana to let villers discount.

**Tools**

- More Relics.
- Hammers.
- Excalibur: Shoot a mana burst that can track mobs.
- VoidArchives: Simulate other relics

**And the boss:**

- Gaia Guardian 3rd
